meta.title: Daily Page - Popular Posts from the Last 24 Hours
meta.description: Daily Page is a minimalist, indie writing site where anyone can post creative thoughts, memories, or experiments—one post at a time. Explore new ideas, join rooms, and contribute your voice.

hero.eyebrow: A quiet place for writing, reading, and returning
hero.title: Welcome to Daily Page!
hero.subtitle: Explore the most popular posts from the last 24 hours.

quests.title: Take part in a community quest
quests.description: Choose a shared goal, claim a contribution, and help the community complete something ambitious.
